data.title: Triage all tests in tests/skills/ and tests/agents/ as delete, replace, or keep
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Systematically triage all tests in tests/skills/ and tests/agents/ directories. For each test file, classify as:

- **delete**: Pure change-detection test with no behavioral value (greps source files for keywords, checks section headings, asserts string presence in markdown)
- **replace**: Has behavioral value but uses anti-patterns (could be rewritten to execute code and assert on output)
- **keep**: Already behavioral (executes code under test and asserts on observable output)

Classification rubric (from pre-commit test quality gate anti-patterns):
1. Source-file grepping: test reads a .md/.py/.sh source file and asserts on its content
2. Existence-only assertions: test only checks that a file/class exists, not behavior
3. String presence checks: test greps for specific strings in source files
4. Tautological tests: test always passes regardless of code state

For each test, also note:
- Whether it appears in .test-index and which source file(s) it maps to
- A one-line rationale for the classification

Record the complete triage as a ticket comment on THIS story (ca06-e969) in a structured format that downstream stories can parse.

## TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: Criterion 3 — this is a pure analysis/documentation task. No code is modified. Output is a structured classification comment on the ticket.

## File Impact
No files modified. Output is a ticket comment.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every test file in tests/skills/ is classified as delete, replace, or keep with rationale
  Verify: echo "Check ticket comment for completeness"
- [ ] Every test file in tests/agents/ is classified as delete, replace, or keep with rationale
  Verify: echo "Check ticket comment for completeness"
- [ ] Classification includes .test-index mapping metadata for each test
  Verify: echo "Check ticket comment for .test-index references"
- [ ] Results recorded as a ticket comment on ca06-e969
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show ca06-e969 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); comments=[c for c in d['comments'] if 'delete' in c['body'].lower() and 'replace' in c['body'].lower()]; exit(0 if comments else 1)"
